facets.name: comment
facets.data: Singleton HUD overlay. Its hud-overlay facet's init() creates a DOM container appended to document.body and styles it from hud-default-tuning. Each tick the facet reads byKind('hero')[0].health + byKind('enemy').length + hero-shoot._seq, paints HP bar + kill count + shots-fired counter. Subsequent iters split widgets into discrete facets but this shell proves the pattern: a Thinga owns its DOM and paints from registry state with zero cross-cutting wiring.
